Author: hoizi
Name: Home Assistant Tiles
Description: Show and control Home Assistant on your keys: lights, switches, locks, climate, covers, vacuum, media & Music Assistant, camera snapshots, weather, presence, scenes/scripts and sensor values.

Actions.Name: HA Entity
Actions.Tooltip: Shows a Home Assistant entity and fires an action on press.

Actions.Name: HA Media / Music Assistant
Actions.Tooltip: Control a media player (play/pause, skip, volume) or start Music Assistant content.
